rationale: Review 2's sole finding is real (the `antipode_convMul_id` lemma at line 64 lives under `TauCeti.HopfAlgebra` inside FunctorOfPoints.lean yet is used only once internally in convInv_mul_cancel, exactly as the diff shows); acting on it yields a strictly better PR. Review 1's placement objections are not grounded in the diff (its module docstring explicitly justifies the AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints location and lists only the eight public decls that belong there) so the demanded split and new files would be needless churn.
